title: Signal Weekly Dry Market Monitor
summary:
Main
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-07 18.10.33.png | assets/2024-02-07_signal-weekly-dry-market-monitor_img_screenshot2024-02-07181033_a467f6f8be5f.png
The second week of February began with a rebound in the Baltic Capesize Index, surpassing the 2,000 points mark, one of the highest points seen in the last two weeks. Meanwhile, smaller vessel size categories continued to trend downward. It remains to be seen whether there will be sustained firmness in the market just a few days before the start of the Chinese New Year.
